description: Style NoteTake casual dressing to the next level with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those days at the lounge. Team this with chinos and simple shirts for that cool, casual look. Product DetailsBlack slip on with a fabric innerStitch detail along the seams of the toe boxTPU outsole with an upraised heel and lugs and grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
